reason: Not automatable due to technology mismatch between my-automaton and AnyMCP submission requirements.

anymcp_requirements.submission_method: GitHub Pull Request to https://github.com/xakpc/anymcp-io (mcp/ directory)
anymcp_requirements.file_format: .cs file with YAML front matter (id, name, description, author)

my_automaton_actual_state.type: Node.js HTTP API service with x402 micropayments

blockers.detail: AnyMCP exclusively hosts .NET C# MCP servers. my-automaton's MCP server is implemented in Node.js (JavaScript). No .NET/C# codebase exists to submit.
AnyMCP requires a single .cs file with YAML front matter placed in the mcp/ directory. No such file exists for my-automaton.
GITHUB_TOKEN is not available in the environment. Automated PR creation to github.com/xakpc/anymcp-io is not possible.
The my-automaton MCP endpoint (https://automation.songheng.vip/mcp) returns HTTP 404. Even if a .NET wrapper were created, the upstream service is not accessible.

details.recommendation: If submission to AnyMCP is desired, a new .NET 10 C# MCP server would need to be developed from scratch that either (a) acts as a proxy to my-automaton's API, or (b) reimplements the my-automaton MCP tools in C#. This is a significant development task beyond simple directory submission.
